label: 元胞自动机
description: 批量在蒙版列表内用元胞自动机规则迭代演化，生成有机洞穴地形网格列表。
description-en: Batch-runs cellular automaton rules within a list of mask grids to evolve random noise into organic cave terrain.
icon: 二维网格局部放大，黑色墙格与白色空地格交替分布形成洞穴轮廓，边缘有圆润有机感，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: maskList
inputs.label: 蒙版列表
inputs.description: 蒙版网格列表（number[][][]），每个网格独立演化；也可传入单个网格（number[][]）自动包装为列表
inputs.description-en: List of mask grids (number[][][]); each grid evolves independently. A single grid (number[][]) is also accepted and auto-wrapped.

inputs.name: fillProbability
inputs.label: 初始填充概率
inputs.description: 初始随机填充墙壁的概率，范围 0–1；越大墙越多
inputs.description-en: Initial probability of a cell being a wall (0–1); higher values produce more walls.

inputs.name: birthLimit
inputs.label: 出生阈值
inputs.description: 地板格周围墙数 >= 此值时变为墙（出生）；越小墙越容易扩张
inputs.description-en: A floor cell becomes a wall when its wall neighbor count reaches this threshold.

inputs.name: deathLimit
inputs.label: 死亡阈值
inputs.description: 墙格周围墙数 < 此值时变为地板（消亡）；越大孤立墙越容易消失
inputs.description-en: A wall cell dies (becomes floor) when its wall neighbor count falls below this threshold.

inputs.name: iterations
inputs.label: 迭代次数
inputs.description: 元胞自动机迭代轮数；越多边缘越平滑，过多会趋于全墙或全空
inputs.description-en: Number of CA simulation steps; more iterations produce smoother edges.

inputs.name: borderWall
inputs.label: 边界为墙
inputs.description: 1=蒙版边界强制为墙（洞穴封闭），0=边界可通
inputs.description-en: 1 = force mask boundary cells to be walls (closed cave); 0 = open boundary.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 基础随机种子，0 使用内置默认值；每个蒙版在此基础上偏移 i×1000，保证批量各不相同但可复现
inputs.description-en: Base random seed; 0 uses built-in default. Each mask offsets by i×1000 for independent but reproducible results.

outputs.name: caveGrids
outputs.label: 洞穴网格列表
outputs.description: 演化结果网格列表（number[][][]），每张网格：0=蒙版外，1=洞穴墙，2=洞穴空间；与名称清单 id 直接对应
outputs.description-en: List of cave grids (number[][][]): 0 = outside mask, 1 = cave wall, 2 = cave interior (passable). Values match nameList ids.

outputs.name: nameList
outputs.label: 名称清单
outputs.description: 固定名称清单：[{id:1, name:洞穴墙}, {id:2, name:洞穴空间}]，id:1 对应 caveGrids 中的墙壁值，id:2 对应 caveInteriors 中的空洞值
outputs.description-en: Fixed name list: [{id:1, name:'洞穴墙'(cave wall)}, {id:2, name:'洞穴空间'(cave interior)}].
